channel.title: Why Use a Prebiotic on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Why Use a Prebiotic on PepsFeeder

item.title: Gut Health, Constipation, and the Truth About “Digestive Boosters”
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Are Gut Boosters BS? Supplement companies claim that prebiotics (which are one thing) and probiotics (another thing!) can strengthen immunity, aid weight loss, and even extend life.
